results.title: Naveen Kumar K.
highlights:
Senior AI/ML & GenAI Engineer | RAG · LLM Fine-Tuning · Agentic AI | LangChain · LLaMA 3 · GPT-4 | AWS · GCP · Azure.
...
Senior AI, ML & Generative AI Engineer at [Principal Financial Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/principalfinancialgroup)
...
• Senior AI/ML & Generative AI Engineer with ~10 years of experience building scalable, enterprise-grade AI solutions across financial services, banking, logistics, and retail. • I specialize in end-to-end AI systems from data engineering to model deployment with a strong focus on Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). I’ve built production systems that reduced manual effort by 40–60%, improved model performance, and enabled real-time intelligent decision-making at scale. • Currently, I design GenAI platforms using GPT-4, LLaMA, and Claude integrated with LangChain/LangGraph, vector databases, and cloud-native MLOps. These systems power document intelligence, advisory workflows, and conversational AI applications used across large organizations. 🔹 Core Expertise: • Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering • Machine Learning (XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow) • NLP & Transformers (BERT, Hugging Face) • MLOps (MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) • Data Engineering (Spark, Airflow, Kafka, Snowflake) • Cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP) • Beyond model building, I focus on scalability, monitoring, explainability, and responsible AI (bias detection, PII handling, governance). • I’ve delivered solutions across fraud detection, recommendation systems, demand forecasting, and financial risk modeling driving measurable business outcomes. • Open to connecting with professionals in AI/ML, Generative AI, and Data Engineering.
...
### Senior AI, ML & Generative AI Engineer at [Principal Financial Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/principalfinancialgroup) (Current)
...
- Architected a production RAG pipeline using LangChain, LLaMA 3 / 3.1 70B (Groq API), and Pinecone enabling financial advisors to query policy documents and regulatory filings in natural language, cutting document review time by over 60%.
...
- Built a LangGraph + GPT-4/4o agentic orchestration system automating financial plan summarization, client onboarding extraction, and compliance checklist validation reducing manual processing by roughly 40%.
...
- Deployed an XGBoost underwriting scorer via FastAPI on AWS SageMaker, achieving strong AUC-ROC performance on 2M+ policyholder records to directly support underwriting decisions.
...
- Fine-tuned LLaMA 3 using PEFT/LoRA for financial-domain Q&A, reducing hallucination rates by over 35% versus a zero-shot GPT-4 baseline.
...
- Defined output filtering, PII redaction, and toxicity detection guardrails across all customer-facing LLM endpoints working with compliance and legal teams to meet financial AI governance standards.
...
- Deployed a fine-tuned RoBERTa classifier auto-categorizing a large volume of annual financial documents (statements, prospectuses, claims) at high accuracy replacing a fully manual routing workflow and freeing up significant analyst capacity.
...

results.title: Sai Yoshitha M.
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral, RAG) | NLP, Deep Learning & MLOps | Cloud Deployment (AWS | Azure | GCP)
...
AI ML Engineer at [Principal Financial Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/principalfinancialgroup)
...
I am an AI/ML Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and deploying advanced machine learning and AI-driven solutions across financial services and enterprise domains. My expertise spans the full ML lifecycle—from data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model development to MLOps, monitoring, and cloud deployment. I specialize in building and optimizing Large Language Models (LLMs) such as LLaMA and Mistral, implementing RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering to create intelligent, context-aware solutions. My work includes fraud detection systems using TensorFlow, BERT, and GPT-4, NER models for entity extraction, and AI-powered conversational assistants that have improved efficiency and customer engagement. Beyond core ML, I bring strong experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), data visualization (Tableau, Power BI), and databases (PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB). I thrive at the intersection of AI innovation and real-world impact—building scalable, secure, and explainable AI systems that drive measurable business outcomes. 🔹 Key strengths: NLP, Deep Learning, MLOps, LLMs, Generative AI, Fraud Detection, and Cloud AI Solutions. 🔹 Passionate about: pushing the boundaries of GenAI, creating ethical AI applications, and turning data into actionable insights.
...
### AI ML Engineer at [Principal Financial Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/principalfinancialgroup) (Current)
...
 Built advanced fraud detection pipelines using TensorFlow, BERT, and GPT-4, significantly enhancing transaction monitoring by reducing false positives by 27% and improving overall anomaly detection accuracy, ensuring safer financial operations.  Implemented end-to-end MLOps workflows leveraging MLflow and Vertex AI, automating model training, validation, and deployment processes, which reduced release cycles and increased team productivity.  Developed sophisticated Named Entity Recognition (NER) models to extract key entities such as customer IDs, merchant names, and transaction categories, accelerating fraud case resolution by 30% and improving operational efficiency in investigations.  Intended Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex, allowing financial advisors to efficiently query vast volumes of policy and compliance documents, which cut manual lookup time by 40% and streamlined advisory workflows.  Experimented with Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to generate synthetic transaction data, strengthening fraud detection models for rare-event scenarios without compromising sensitive customer information, enhancing model robustness.  Established AI-powered dashboards in Tableau, delivering real-time insights into fraud alerts, model performance metrics, and customer engagement trends, enabling executives to make informed, data-driven decisions.  Generated large language models (LLMs) such as LLaMA and integrated them with LlamaIndex to build intelligent conversational banking assistants, increasing customer self-service adoption by 22% and reducing operational workload on support teams. Show less

results.title: Sai Nikhitha Jinkala
highlights:
Data Scientist | AI/ML Engineer | IBM AS/400 Modernization | Gen AI | LLM | RAG | Data Engineering l Python | PySpark | MLOps | AWS |
...
AI ML Engineer at [Principal Financial Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/principalfinancialgroup)
...
I am a Data Scientist, Data Engineer, and AI/ML Engineer with more than 7 years of experience building scalable ETL pipelines, real time streaming systems, and production ready machine learning workflows across AWS, Databricks, and enterprise data platforms. I focus on designing cloud native data systems that support analytics, personalization, and AI driven decision making. My expertise includes Python, SQL, PySpark, AWS services such as S3, Glue, Lambda, Kinesis, Redshift, SageMaker, and Bedrock, along with Databricks and modern MLOps tooling. I have built end to end ML pipelines, automated feature engineering workflows, and LLM powered systems that reduce manual effort, accelerate experimentation, and improve operational efficiency. I also work across the full data science lifecycle including feature engineering, model development, evaluation, and deployment. I bring strong IBM AS400 experience, including RPG IV, CL, DB2 on AS400, and high volume batch processing. I have modernized AS400 workloads, integrated legacy systems with cloud platforms, and built ETL pipelines that connect traditional enterprise systems with modern analytics and AI ecosystems. This combination of legacy modernization and advanced ML engineering helps me solve complex data challenges across the entire lifecycle. I enjoy working at the intersection of data engineering, data science, machine learning, and AI innovation. My goal is to build systems that are fast, reliable, secure, and ready for the future. I work closely with cross functional teams to deliver solutions that create measurable business impact.

results.title: Principal Financial Group AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Principal Financial Group, a Fortune 500 company with $712 billion in assets under management, has implemented a comprehensive AI strategy built around responsible innovation and organizational transformation[2]. CEO Deanna Strable mandated AI literacy training for the C-suite before rolling out the company's first-ever enterprise-wide AI program, with 82% of the company's 20,000 employees completing at least one AI course[5]. Principal has deployed the 'Principal AI Generative Experience,' an AI-powered assistant that has grown from 800 to over 14,000 active users[9][10], delivering a 50% reduction in task completion times and 90% reduction in customer onboarding time[9]. The company operates under an Ethical and Responsible AI (ERAI) framework that evaluates every AI use case for risk and ensures fairness, transparency, and control[3].

Intuit is the global financial technology platform that powers prosperity for the people and communities we serve. With over 100 million customers worldwide using our flagship products - TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, we believe that everyone should have the opportunity to prosper. Intuit’s strategy is to be a global AI-driven expert platform delivering world-class experiences for our customers at unprecedented speed and scale. With AI at the heart of the strategy, Intuit has created a new organization led by our Chief AI Officer to drive Intuit’s evolution as a global AI technology leader through a dedicated research and innovation focus and a partnership with leading academic and industry organizations. Intuit’s AI teams have access to rich data and production grade AI platforms, enabling our scientists and engineers to move quickly from research to impact.
...
We are seeking a self-motivated, hands-on Principal AI Engineer who operates with a high degree of autonomy and builds impactful products with high velocity to join Intuit’s Foresight organization. You will be responsible for leveraging the latest advances in AI to solve complex, high-impact technical problems that unlock entirely new AI-driven experiences through the new 0 → 1 AI native products that you will build. Your work will directly shape how millions of Intuit’s customers, both small businesses and individuals, prosper through the effective use of AI within our platforms and products. If you are a builder who loves to ship fast, learn continuously, and independently drive impact, then this is the right role for you.

# Principal Engineer, AI
...
🔔 Pennsylvania – Remote🔔 Pennsylvania – Remote

Anaplan is a leading provider of connected planning and business modeling solutions. The platform enables organizations to transform their decision-making processes using intelligent planning, data management, and predictive insights. Anaplan serves a diverse range of industries, including consumer goods, financial services, and manufacturing, by offering tailored solutions that enhance productivity and drive digital transformation. Recognized by Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, Anaplan is a trusted partner for enterprises looking to improve collaboration and gain a competitive edge through agile and comprehensive planning tools.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Lead the architecture, design, and deployment of scalable Generative AI and Machine learning systems into production environments. • Develop end-to-end GenAI features, including backend API services, model integration, model monitoring, evaluations, and deployments. • Integrate and optimize LLMs for specific business planning use cases, including prompt engineering and RAG implementation. • Build conversational interfaces and agentic workflows that make complex planning tasks accessible through natural language • Implement evaluation frameworks to measure and improve GenAI feature quality, including accuracy, latency, and user satisfaction metrics • Design and develop APIs that expose AI capabilities to Anaplan's platform and third-party integrations • Optimize model inference pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability in production environments • Implement monitoring, logging, and observability for GenAI systems to track usage, errors, and model behavior. • Collaborate with data scientists to productionise ML models and forecasting algorithms
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Extensive hands-on professional experience in the field of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or related engineering domains. • End-to-end exposure in model lifecycle development, including extensive experience in training and deploying ML models in production environments. • Deep knowledge of LLM APIs, prompt engineering, and conversational AI patterns. • Experience in fine-tuning LLMs for domain-specific enterprise applications. • Strong expertise in MLOps and LLMOps, ensuring scalable, reliable, and monitorable model deployments. • Experience with agentic frameworks and autonomous agent architectures. • Proficiency in Python and modern software development practices (testing, code review, CI/CD). • Proven track record of delivering complex technical projects on time with high quality.
